one_line_thesis: Nucor — thesis pending Marvin deep dive.

investment_committee.strongest_dissent: The valuation may capitalize an exceptional policy-and-demand environment while also crediting projects whose own supply contribution causes the margin normalization.
unresolved_items: Maintenance capex and full-cycle segment cash earnings are not independently reconciled.

decision.primary_power_zone: Capital cycle and normalized industry economics
decision.next_action: Close critical evidence gaps before freezing a decision-grade packet.

components.label: Steel mills through-cycle value
components.evidence: Nucor FY2025 results and segment operating statistics.
components.scenario_assumptions: Normalize shipments, spread, utilization, maintenance capital, and tax across a full steel cycle rather than capitalizing 2025 or spot margins.
components.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
components.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

components.label: Downstream steel products
components.evidence: FY2025 steel-products pretax income of $1.229bn and product-volume disclosures.
components.scenario_assumptions: Value downstream earnings separately using normalized backlog, margins, and maintenance capital.
components.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
components.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

components.label: Raw materials and recycling
components.evidence: FY2025 raw-materials pretax income of $153m; commodity and outage normalization pending.
components.scenario_assumptions: Use through-cycle DRI, scrap, and brokerage economics after sustaining capital.
components.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
components.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

components.label: Net debt and lease claims
components.evidence: FY2025 cash/investments of $2.699bn and debt/lease obligations of $7.121bn.
components.scenario_assumptions: Deduct all debt and finance leases net of cash and short-term investments; range reflects required operating liquidity.
components.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
components.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

components.label: New-project ramp and replacement-cost optionality
components.evidence: Management identified new rebar, melt-shop, towers, and coating projects; project-level invested capital and returns remain to be reconciled.
components.scenario_assumptions: Credit only probability-weighted after-tax cash returns above the cost of capital, net of remaining spend and ramp losses.

probability_and_timing.timing_basis: Scenario range includes delay and failure outcomes.
probability_and_timing.probability_basis: Starter probability is an explicit analyst judgment pending base-rate and milestone reconciliation.
probability_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Remaining capital and financing are deducted in the stated option range.

components.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
components.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

committee.strongest_dissent: The valuation may capitalize an exceptional policy-and-demand environment while also crediting projects whose own supply contribution causes the margin normalization.
unresolved_items: Maintenance capex and full-cycle segment cash earnings are not independently reconciled.
committee.next_action: Close the committee's primary-evidence blockers before requesting an owner decision.

gaps.question: Map domestic and global additions, closures, imports, replacement costs, and the likely supply response by product.
gaps.evidence_required: Primary filings or contracts plus an independently reproducible calculation and relevant cross-check.
gaps.acceptance_test: The evidence reproduces the low/base/high bridge, resolves overlap, and identifies a falsifier and monitoring source.
gaps.progress_note: not_met: no independent product-level capacity/import/replacement-cost map.

gaps.question: Reconcile project-level invested capital, remaining spend, ramp curves, incremental returns, and overlap with normalized segment earnings.
gaps.evidence_required: Primary filings or contracts plus an independently reproducible calculation and relevant cross-check.
gaps.acceptance_test: The evidence reproduces the low/base/high bridge, resolves overlap, and identifies a falsifier and monitoring source.
gaps.progress_note: partially_met: WV mill cost/tons disclosed; mature project ROIC incomplete.

gaps.question: Reconcile segment shipments, spreads, utilization, maintenance capital, tax, and mid-cycle earnings over multiple cycles.
gaps.evidence_required: Primary filings or contracts plus an independently reproducible calculation and relevant cross-check.
gaps.acceptance_test: The evidence reproduces the low/base/high bridge, resolves overlap, and identifies a falsifier and monitoring source.
gaps.progress_note: partially_met: 2025 segment pretax and utilization disclosed; multi-cycle maintenance owner earnings incomplete.

gaps.question: Maintenance capex and full-cycle segment cash earnings are not independently reconciled.
gaps.evidence_required: Resolve the committee's missing fact with primary evidence and update the affected valuation proof row.
gaps.acceptance_test: The committee item is explicitly closed, sourced, and reflected in the valuation range or documented as immaterial.

method_fit.label: Capital cycle and normalized industry economics
applicability_tests: Industry capacity, additions, closures, and replacement costs can be measured.
Current margins can be located relative to a cycle rather than extrapolated.
Maintenance and growth capital are separated.
Leverage and liquidity survive the low case.
failure_modes: replacement cost used for assets that cannot earn their cost of capital

validation_cohort.purpose: Test depletion, commodity exposure, finite reserves, and royalty-unit reconciliation.
Test tangible capital, credit losses, funding, regulation, and excess-capital realization.
Test owner earnings, capital-light reinvestment, cyclicality, and buyback value creation.
Test normalized margins, industry supply response, replacement cost, and reinvestment timing.
Test product concentration, pipeline probabilities, patent cliffs, and catalyst timing.

method_fit.rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

outcomes.weighting_rule: Do not change a persona's relevance within a power zone until at least 20 attributable, dividend-aware outcomes exist there; never reweight automatically.

attribution.explanation: A complete security value is intentionally withheld while material components are unpriced. Attribution restarts after the first proof-complete baseline.

component_valuation.decision_rule: Use the complete low/base/high component schedule. Embedded components are estimated but not added twice.

economic_value.accounting_reference: Nucor FY2025 results: 230.9m diluted shares, segment pretax income of $2.383bn steel mills, $1.229bn steel products, and $153m raw materials; $2.699bn cash/investments and $7.121bn debt/lease obligations.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of NUE, including every identified operating claim, asset, liability, and option.
economic_claim.unit_source: Nucor FY2025 results: 230.9m diluted shares, segment pretax income of $2.383bn steel mills, $1.229bn steel products, and $153m raw materials; $2.699bn cash/investments and $7.121bn debt/lease obligations.
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Operating and asset claims are valued once; cash, debt, financing, reserves, and other senior claims are included as separate components or within the stated equity basis.

insights.title: EPS (basic) accelerating
insights.claim: EPS (basic) growth moved from +150.5% to +382.1% YoY for two consecutive quarters. Trailing-twelve-month growth confirms the same direction. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.

insights.title: Growth regime upshift
insights.claim: Growth regime upshift: YoY growth moved to -3.0% to +382.1% YoY (baseline median -37.0% YoY) for two consecutive quarters. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.

valuation_route.label: Capital cycle and normalized industry economics
